source: Verified open government job advertisements (reference date 2026-07-01; 25 live verified)

items.title: Indian Navy Agniveer (Apprentice) 01/27 & 02/27
items.qualificationShort: Matriculation 50% aggregate + 3-yr AICTE-recognised polytechnic diploma 50% aggregate (Engineering or Electrical streams per advt)
items.ageLimitShort: 01/27 batch: DOB 01 Dec 2004–31 May 2009; 02/27 batch: DOB 01 May 2005–31 Oct 2009; unmarried male only
items.feeShort: Stage I INET: Rs 550 + 18% GST (online); no separate Stage II fee
items.selectionProcessShort: Stage I: INET 2/2026 (online); Stage II: PFT, written exam, recruitment medical; state-wise merit
items.notificationWindowText: Online registration 05/06/2026 10:00 to 05/07/2026 17:00 IST (extended from 29/06/2026 per official Indian Navy website on 05/07/2026)
items.examWindowText: Stage I INET Aug 2026; results end Aug/early Sep 2026. Stage II: 01/27 batch Oct 2026, 02/27 batch Mar 2027. Training Dec 2026 / May 2027 per advt.
items.trustNote: Strict verification completed 2026-07-05 from official Agniveer (Apprentice) PDF and Indian Navy website extension notice (1700 hrs on 05 Jul 26). Trade-wise vacancy count not declared. Apply only via AVR (Apprentice) INET 2/26 portal.

items.title: Indian Navy SSC Various Entries — Jun 2027 (AT 27) Course
items.vacanciesText: 275 tentative SSC vacancies across 12 entry groups — see post-wise details
items.qualificationShort: Entry-wise BE/BTech or higher qualifications with minimum marks — see structured post-wise details
items.ageLimitShort: Entry-wise date-of-birth bands for unmarried men and women — see post-wise details
items.feeShort: As per Indian Navy officer entry norms (see official notification)
items.selectionProcessShort: SSB shortlisting and interview, medical standards, merit at Indian Naval Academy Ezhimala
items.notificationWindowText: Online applications 25/06/2026 to 27/07/2026 via joinindiannavy.gov.in officer registration per official SSC Jun 2027 notification
items.examWindowText: SSB dates to be allotted; course commencing Jun 2027 at INA Ezhimala per advt
items.trustNote: Strict verification completed 2026-07-05 from official SSC Jun 2027 PDF (275 tentative vacancies across 12 entries). Vacancies may change per training slots. Apply via officer login on joinindiannavy.gov.in.

items.title: SBI Probationary Officer (PO) 2026-27
items.qualificationShort: Graduation (Bachelor's degree); category-wise marks as per advt; final-year if degree by 30.09.2026
items.feeShort: Rs 750 for General/OBC/EWS; nil for SC/ST/PwBD per advt
items.selectionProcessShort: Phase I: Online Preliminary; Phase II: Main; Phase III: Psychometric test, Group Exercise & Interview
items.notificationWindowText: Online registration and fee payment 18.06.2026 to 08.07.2026 as per SBI advertisement CRPD/PO/2026-27/09.
items.examWindowText: Phase I Prelims tentative Aug 2026; Phase II Mains Sep 2026; Phase III GE/Interview Oct–Nov 2026. Tentative per advt.
items.trustNote: Strict verification completed 2026-07-05 from SBI detailed advertisement CRPD/PO/2026-27/09 (official PDF). No corrigendum located. Apply only via official IBPS registration portal.

items.title: New India Assurance Apprentice FY 2026-27
items.organisation: The New India Assurance Co. Ltd.
items.vacanciesText: 550 Apprenticeship training seats (state-wise reservation per advt)
items.qualificationShort: Graduation completed; passing mark sheet dated 01.01.2022 to 01.06.2026 inclusive; NATS profile 100% complete
items.ageLimitShort: 21–30 years as on 01.06.2026 (DOB 01.06.1996–31.05.2005); SC/ST/OBC/PwBD relaxation per advt
items.feeShort: Gen/EWS/OBC Male Rs 944; Female Rs 708; SC/ST/PwBD Rs 236 (incl. GST per advt)
items.selectionProcessShort: Online written test (BFSI SSC) + Regional Language Test at document verification; merit state/category-wise
items.notificationWindowText: Online registration 23.06.2026 to 06.07.2026 via NATS portal; then BFSI SSC application and fee on beep.bfsissc.com per official advertisement.
items.examWindowText: Online examination 12.07.2026 (BFSI SSC). Stipend Rs 12,300/month for 12-month apprenticeship.
items.trustNote: Strict verification completed 2026-07-05 from official Apprentice Advertisement 2026-27 PDF. Apprenticeship engagement — not a regular job. Register on NATS first, then complete BFSI SSC application and fee on beep.bfsissc.com per advertisement.

items.title: Gujarat High Court Legal Assistant 2026
items.vacanciesText: 65 Legal Assistant posts on purely contractual basis
items.qualificationShort: Fresh law graduate with minimum 55% marks (or equivalent CGPA) from a UGC-recognized university; final-year 3-yr/5-yr LL.B. candidates may apply subject to passing with 55% before appointment; basic computer knowledge and Gujarati language required
items.ageLimitShort: Not more than 26 years as on 20.07.2026 (last date of online application)
items.feeShort: Rs 500 plus bank charges via SBI e-Pay on HC-OJAS portal
items.selectionProcessShort: Objective-type written test (MCQs) on 09.08.2026; viva-voce in August/September 2026 per official advertisement
items.notificationWindowText: Online applications 01.07.2026 12:00 hrs to 20.07.2026 23:59 hrs IST via hc-ojas.gujarat.gov.in
items.examWindowText: Written test 09.08.2026 (Sunday); viva-voce August/September 2026
items.trustNote: Strict verification completed 2026-07-05 from Gujarat High Court Advertisement RC/B/1320/2026 (LA). Purely contractual engagement — Rs 60,000/month fixed remuneration, initial 11 months extendable up to 11 further months. Not a judicial service examination.

items.title: Delhi Higher Judicial Service Examination 2026
items.category: Judicial Jobs / Higher Judicial Service / Delhi
items.vacanciesText: 27 vacancies (24 existing + 3 anticipated) for Delhi Higher Judicial Service
items.qualificationShort: Advocate: minimum 7 years continuous practice as on 15.07.2026; Judicial Officer pathway: 7 years combined as Judicial Officer and Advocate per official advertisement
items.ageLimitShort: Must have attained 35 years and not attained 45 years on last date of application (15.07.2026)
items.feeShort: Rs 2,000 for General category; Rs 500 for SC/ST/PwBD (40%+ benchmark disability)
items.selectionProcessShort: Preliminary Examination (objective, 25% negative marking), Mains Examination (written), Viva-voce per official advertisement
items.notificationWindowText: Online applications 01.07.2026 from 10:00 hrs to 15.07.2026 17:30 hrs IST via official Delhi High Court application portal
items.examWindowText: Preliminary, Mains and Viva-voce dates to be notified by Delhi High Court per official advertisement
items.trustNote: Strict verification completed 2026-07-05 from Delhi High Court official advertisement PDF and apply portal link. Direct recruitment to Delhi Higher Judicial Service — not a local PLA notice.

items.feeShort: Rs 850 (inclusive of GST) for General/OBC/EWS; Rs 175 for SC/ST/PwBD
items.selectionProcessShort: Online Preliminary Examination, Online Main Examination, Personality Test/Interview; provisional allotment Jan 2027

items.title: UPPSC PCS 2026

items.qualificationShort: Graduation for most posts; post-wise special qualifications for select posts (e.g. Computer Engineering degree, MSc/MA paths) per official notification
items.ageLimitShort: 21–40 years as on 01/07/2026 for most posts (DOB not earlier than 02/07/1986 and not later than 01/07/2005); post-wise variations per advt
items.feeShort: General/EWS Rs 125; OBC Rs 65 (Rs 40 exam + Rs 25 online); SC/ST Rs 25 online processing; PwBD exempt from exam fee + Rs 25 online

items.trustNote: Strict verification completed 2026-07-05 from official UPPSC Advt A-1/E-1/2026 English PDF (~500 provisional vacancies). OTR required before application. No corrigendum located.

items.title: RRB Technician CEN 02/2026
items.vacanciesText: 6557 posts — Technician Grade-I Signal 323 + Technician Grade-III 6234
items.qualificationShort: Grade-I Signal (323): B.Sc (Physics/Electronics/CS/IT/Instrumentation) or Diploma/Degree in Engineering in relevant streams; Grade-III (6234): Matriculation/SSLC + NCVT/SCVT ITI in post-specific trade OR completed Act Apprenticeship in that trade per CEN 02/2026
items.ageLimitShort: Grade-I Signal: 18–33 years; Grade-III: 18–30 years as on 01.07.2026 (relaxations per CEN)
items.feeShort: Rs 500 (Rs 400 refunded after appearing in CBT, minus bank charges); Rs 250 for SC/ST/Ex-Servicemen/PwBD/Female/Transgender/Minorities/EBC (Rs 250 refunded after CBT); fee exempt categories per CEN 02/2026
items.selectionProcessShort: Computer Based Test (CBT), Document Verification, Medical Examination per CEN 02/2026
items.notificationWindowText: Online applications 30.06.2026 to 29.07.2026 23:59 hrs IST via rrbapply.gov.in; fee payment till 31.07.2026 23:59; modification window 01.08.2026–10.08.2026 per CEN 02/2026
items.examWindowText: CBT dates to be notified on participating RRB websites per CEN 02/2026
items.trustNote: Strict verification completed 2026-07-05 from official RRB CEN 02/2026 PDF (6557 vacancies: 323 Grade-I Signal + 6234 Grade-III). No corrigendum located. Apply only via rrbapply.gov.in.

items.qualificationShort: Graduate (19): B.E./B.Tech Electronics & Communication 60%; Diploma (8): Diploma in ECE/related 60%; ITI (50): NCVT/SCVT ITI in listed trades; qualifying exam passed in 2022–2026; higher qualifications not eligible per advt
items.ageLimitShort: Minimum 18 years; maximum age and relaxations per Apprentices Act 1961 and NATS 2.0/NAPS guidelines
items.feeShort: No application fee stated in official DEAL/HRD/Apprenticeship/2026-27 advertisement
items.selectionProcessShort: Merit-based selection via NATS 2.0 (Graduate/Diploma) or NAPS (ITI); joining intimation by email to selected candidates
items.notificationWindowText: Applications within 30 days of publication on drdo.gov.in (published 23.06.2026; last date 23.07.2026). Register on NATS 2.0 portal and apply against DEAL ID NUKDDC000015.
items.examWindowText: No written exam; merit selection and email joining instructions per official advertisement
items.trustNote: Strict verification completed 2026-07-05 from official DEAL/HRD/Apprenticeship/2026-27 PDF. Apprenticeship training — not regular permanent employment. Stipend Rs 12,300/month. Apply via NATS 2.0 (https://nats.education.gov.in) for DEAL ID NUKDDC000015.

items.feeShort: No application fee per official advertisement
